meaning: adj.&n.抗惊厥的(药物),抗痉挛的(药物)
examples: Anticonvulsive drugs later relieved her of these delusions and most of her other symptoms.
Objective: To study the sedative, hypnotic and anticonvulsive effects of Long Gu in mice.
Conclusion Qinggong Decoction has obvious effects of sedation, hypnosis and anticonvulsive.
Additional risk is faced by women who have the genetic defect, and who take the anticonvulsive drug phenytoin for conditions such as epilepsy.
